name: G-Switch 2
author: Poki
description: Flip gravity to keep moving forward in G-Switch 2! This futuristic sequel lets you compete against 7 other players on the same device. Your mission is to run, flip, and leap farther than everyone else. Keep switching the direction of gravity! About the creator: G-Switch 2 is created by Serius Games, the creator behind G-Switch and G-Switch 3 .
